name: 深情表白型
description: 男主用行動和細節證明深情，不是空洞的情話而是具體的觀察，讓表白更有說服力。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: The moment I opened my eyes, I knew she wasn't you. She wasn't afraid of the dark and she didn't have any burn marks on her hands. / I never would have stopped looking.
